title: Dreamy Roasted Egyptian Ovoli Mushroom Tagine
description: A romantic Egyptian dish featuring roasted ovoli mushrooms in a rich and flavorful tagine sauce, perfect for a special occasion. This recipe is onion and garlic free, making it suitable for those with dietary restrictions.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, honey, cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the ovoli mushrooms to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Spread the mushrooms in a single layer on a baking sheet and roast for 20 minutes.
While the mushrooms are roasting, heat the chicken broth in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Once the mushrooms are done, add them to the saucepan with the chicken broth.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer the tagine sauce for 10 minutes.
Stir in the chopped parsley and serve the dreamy roasted Egyptian ovoli mushroom tagine hot.
Garnish with additional parsley if desired.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
